name: @generata/coding
description: Plan-driven coding pipeline: interview, plan, audit, execute, review, commit. Optional Cloudflare deploy.

requiredBins.name: wrangler
requiredBins.hint: npm i -g wrangler - only if using cloudflare-deployer

WORKDIR.description: Absolute path where projects/, plans/, metrics/ live

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token for run notifications

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat ID where notifications post

postInstall:
Coding template installed. Try:
  pnpm generata help workflows
  pnpm generata workflow daily-plan
  pnpm generata workflow execute-plan --plan_name my-first

Notes:
  - Set WORKDIR in .env to point at your projects directory
  - The 'cloudflare-deployer' agent and 'deploy-project' workflow are optional; ignore unless you deploy to Cloudflare
  - 'ship-ticket' and 'ship-from-slack' workflows are not in this template; use @generata/work for those
